name: Italian Cuisine
description: Classic Italian-American pizzeria and pasta restaurant

items.notes: Base template for a large cheese pizza. Add toppings as needed.
Pepperoni, sausage, meatball, and bacon pizza.
Includes peppers, onions, and mushrooms.
Comes with dinner salad and bread.
Served with choice of two sides.
Served with marinara sauce.
Large Caesar salad with bread.

name: Middle Eastern Cuisine
description: Authentic Lebanese and Middle Eastern cuisine

items.notes: Served with side dip of garlic sauce, rice, salad, and hummus.
Includes lettuce, tomatoes, onions, pickles, and tahini sauce.
Classic chickpea and tahini dip. Add beef or chicken for premium version.
Grilled eggplant, tahini sauce, garlic, and virgin olive oil.
Two skewers of marinated chicken breast, grilled. Served with sides.
Skewer of kafta grilled on charcoal barbecue. Garnished with grilled tomato & onion.
Kafta skewer with hummus, fresh parsley, onion, turnips, pickles and tomato.
Golden pieces of falafel garnished with mixed pickles, served with tahini sauce.
Falafel with tahini sauce, salad, hummus, and rice.
Authentic jerk chicken marinated overnight, grilled over pimento wood preferred. Served with rice & peas and steamed cabbage.
Traditional curry goat slow-cooked until tender. Best when marinated in curry overnight.
Oxtail slow-braised until fall-off-the-bone tender with butter beans in rich gravy.
Flaky golden crust filled with seasoned ground beef. Can add cheese for Cheesy Beef Patty variant.
Jamaica's national dish. Saltfish must be soaked overnight to remove excess salt.
Tender beef strips stir-fried with bell peppers in peppercorn sauce.
Classic Jamaican rice and peas (actually kidney beans). The scotch bonnet is added whole for flavor, not chopped.
Traditional breakfast or side dish. Callaloo is like Jamaican spinach.
Jerk chicken on coco bread with coleslaw and chipotle mayo.
Ripe plantains sliced and fried until caramelized.
Traditional street tacos with grilled steak, onions, cilantro, and lime.
Marinated pork cooked on vertical spit with pineapple. Authentic street-style.
San Diego-style burrito with carne asada, french fries, guacamole, and cheese.
Three chicken enchiladas topped with red sauce and melted cheese. Served with rice and beans.
Slow-braised pork shoulder, crispy on the outside, tender inside. Served with all the fixings.
Loaded nachos with seasoned ground beef, beans, cheese, and all toppings.
Roasted poblano peppers stuffed with cheese, battered and fried. Served with tomato sauce.
Large flour tortilla stuffed with grilled chicken and cheese, served with sides.
Hearty chicken soup with avocado, cheese, tortilla strips, and lime.
Freshly made guacamole tableside style. Add $1.50 for extra ingredients like bacon or pomegranate.
Traditional steamed corn dough filled with seasoned pork. Labor intensive but authentic.

name: Asian Cuisine
description: Asian fusion restaurant with Chinese, Japanese, and Thai influences

common_ingredients.name: Scallops (U-10)
common_ingredients.note: Purchased by weight, approx 1 oz lb

items.notes: Crispy fried chicken in sweet and spicy sauce. Most popular Chinese-American dish.
Grilled chicken glazed with teriyaki sauce. Served with steamed vegetables and rice.
Thailand's national dish. Stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, tofu, egg, and tamarind sauce.
Most popular sushi roll in America. Inside-out roll with crab, avocado, and cucumber.
Crispy fried spring rolls with vegetable filling. Served with sweet chili sauce.
Classic Thai hot and sour soup. Can be made with shrimp instead of chicken.
Cantonese-style wide rice noodles stir-fried with beef and bean sprouts.
Spicy Thai curry with coconut milk, eggplant, and Thai basil. Adjust spice level.
Steamed soybeans in the pod, lightly salted. High profit margin appetizer.
Japanese-style breaded and deep-fried pork cutlet. Served with shredded cabbage and rice.
Spicy tuna mixed with mayo and scallions. Popular sushi roll choice.
Japanese ramen with rich pork bone broth. Labor intensive broth but high customer demand.

name: Indian Cuisine
description: Authentic Indian restaurant with North and South Indian specialties

items.notes: Britain's national dish! Grilled chicken chunks in creamy tomato sauce. Marinate chicken overnight for best flavor.
Creamy, buttery tomato-based curry. Cashew paste adds richness and thickens the gravy.
Cubes of Indian cheese in creamy tomato sauce. Popular vegetarian option.
Kashmiri lamb curry with deep red color. Slow-cooked until tender. Authentic version uses dried Kashmiri chilies.
Chickpea curry, one of India's most popular dishes. Soak chickpeas overnight for best results.
Layered rice dish with marinated chicken. Dum cooking (sealed pot) method preferred. Served with raita.
Paneer in creamy spinach gravy. Blanch spinach quickly to retain bright green color.
Crispy fried pastry filled with spiced potatoes and peas. India's most popular street food.
Traditional clay oven roasted chicken. Marinate for at least 4 hours, preferably overnight.
Leavened flatbread cooked in tandoor. Brush with garlic butter after cooking.
Creamy black lentils slow-cooked overnight for best flavor. Signature dish of Punjab.
Crispy fermented crepe filled with spiced potatoes. South India's most famous breakfast dish.
